productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Printed Red T-shirt
description: Composition Red round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed neckline, short sleeves, a panel at the back, brand badge on the left sleeve and graphic print on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This stylish T-shirt from status quo makes you look chic with ease. The appliquéd brand seal enhances the brand image while the panel stitch adds a fashionable touch and, as it's crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team this with jeans or chinos. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
